Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Elder Whitehall]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Elder Whitehall is a Jade stage practitioner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Elder Whitehall wears a Jade arrow badge on his chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Elder Whitehall is an elder of the Heaven's Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — Elder Whitehall provided Lindon with a token.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Elder Whitehall is an elder who uses golden light attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — Elder Whitehall was wounded by the Sword Disciple.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Elder Whitehall's body is at the Iron stage and his spirit is at the Jade stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Elder Whitehall uses the Heaven’s Lance technique.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
